MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556
  • Home
  • Development Library
  • Examples
  • Release Notes
CaptureByField C++

CaptureByField illuminates how to trigger the video capture when a video field cache event is received.
Compared with CaptureByInput C++, this example shows how to capture the top and bottom field of the intetlaced signal sequentially. Using this example you can get a copy which doubles the top field data in vertical direction as a frame and a copy which doubles the bottom field data in vertical direction. That is double frames of the original video.
Folder dir: SDKv3\Examples\Legacy_Legacy_VC++\CmdTools\CaptureByField

Supported Hardware

Pro Capture Family

Features

  1. Capture the video data in the format of the input signal.
  2. Save the last frame as a .bmp file.
  3. Specify the capture channel when multiple devices are loaded in your system.

Flow Chart

CaptureByField

Workflow

  1. To get device version, initialize and enumerate all available devices, call: MWGetVersion, MWCaptureInitInstance, MWGetChannelCount
  2. To find the valid capture card according to the device info,, call: MWGetChannelInfoByIndex;

  3. Conduct any of the following steps to open a channel:

    1. To open the specified channel according to the command parameter, call: MWOpenChannel;
    2. To open the first available channel by default when there is not a specified channel, call: MWGetDevicePath, MWOpenChannelByPath;
  4. To get the video signal status, call: MWGetVideoSignalStatus;
  5. To start video capture, call: MWStartVideoCapture;
  6. To register for notifications, call:MWRegisterNotify:To progressively scan for notifications, call: MWCAP_NOTIFY_VIDEO_FIELD_BUFFERED;
  7. To get a video frame triggered by the specified notifications, call:MWGetNotifyStatus, MWCaptureVideoFrameToVirtualAddressEx;
  8. To get current capture status, and clear the memory of capture card, call: MWGetVideoCaptureStatus;
  9. Repeat step 7 and 8.
  10. Save the last frame as a BMP file.
  11. To stop recording, and free up system resources and memory, call: MWUnregisterNotify, MWStopVideoCapture, MWCloseChannel, MWCaptureExitInstance

Result

CaptureByField
